description: elkjs (Eclipse Layout Kernel, JS build) — optional D2 layout engine selectable via vmarkd.diagram.d2Layout. We bundle elk-api.js (the ELK class) + elk-worker.min.js (the in-process 'fake worker') via esbuild into media/vditor/dist/js/elk/elk-main.js (see media-src/src/elk-entry.ts + media-src/build.mjs). This runs the layout on the MAIN THREAD with NO Web Worker — the stock elk.bundled.js spawns a blob Web Worker that fails under the VS Code webview, so we deliberately avoid it.
